name: Zapplet
idle: Ears twitch in alternation, small sparks pop between ear tips in a 4-frame cycle. Tail tip glows bright then dims. Subtle forward-back weight shift on front paws.
attack: Crouches low with ears flattened (wind-up), then lunges forward with an electric arc trailing from tail tip. Body stretches into the lunge. Snaps back to standing with residual sparks scattering.
hurt: Flinches backward with ears pressed flat against head, sparks scatter outward from body. Eyes squeeze shut. Small recoil hop.
ko: Staggers sideways with sparks sputtering. Slumps onto side with ears drooping down. Tail light flickers twice then goes dark. Body dims.

name: Sparkfin
idle: Fins flutter in a gentle rhythm, small electric motes drift upward from fin tips. Body bobs slightly in a hovering motion as if suspended in water.
attack: Fins spread wide and flare bright, then a burst of spark particles showers forward from the fin array. Body pushes forward with the release, then settles back.
hurt: Fins fold inward defensively, body jerks backward. Sparks scatter from the point of impact. A brief crackle of disrupted electricity.
ko: Rolls slowly to one side, fins droop and go limp. Electric motes sputter out one by one. Body settles to the ground, dimming.

name: Stonepaw
idle: Slow, heavy breathing — body expands and contracts visibly. Small stone fragments shift and resettle on the body surface. Solid, planted stance with minimal movement.
attack: Rears back on hind legs, then swipes forward with a heavy forepaw, launching a rock chunk. Dust particles scatter from the impact of the paw. Returns to all fours with a solid thump.
hurt: Body rocks backward from impact, a visible crack appears on one of the stone plates. Small rock chips fly off. Shakes head to recover.
ko: Stone plates crack and separate. Body crumbles forward, legs buckling. Breaks apart into a pile of rocks and rubble. Dust settles.

name: Mossling
idle: Sways gently side to side as if in a breeze. Leaves rustle and shift. Small root tendrils at the base flex and grip. A subtle green glow pulses through the moss.
attack: Leans back, then whips a vine tendril forward in a fast arc across the frame. The vine extends well beyond the body. Snaps back with leaves scattering from the motion.
hurt: Recoils sharply, leaves shake loose and fall. Body compresses inward. A few root tendrils lift off the ground from the impact force.
ko: Wilts downward — body droops, leaves go limp and brown. Root tendrils retract into the ground. Settles into a flat, lifeless mound. Color desaturates.

name: Driftwisp
idle: Hovers with a slow vertical drift (up-down). Body semi-transparent edges phase in and out. Fluid tendrils trail and ripple below. Core glows with a steady teal pulse.
attack: Body compresses into a tight dart shape, then shoots forward leaving a phase-trail afterimage. Elongates during the dash. Reforms at rest position with rippling edges settling.
hurt: Form destabilizes — edges flicker and distort like signal static. Body jerks back with a brief loss of transparency (goes more opaque, then recovers). Core flickers.
ko: Form unravels from the edges inward. Tendrils dissipate into mist. Core light dims and shrinks to a point, then winks out. Empty space where it floated.

name: Glitchkit
idle: Jitters in place with occasional pixel-glitch artifacts — parts of the body momentarily shift position or color. Small data-particle squares orbit the body. Eyes blink asynchronously.
attack: Glitches forward in a stuttery teleport-dash, body leaving brief afterimages at wrong positions. Arrives at target zone with a burst of corrupted pixel particles. Glitches back to position.
hurt: Heavy glitch — body scrambles into wrong colors and positions, like a corrupted image. Snaps back together but slightly off-center. Pixel fragments scatter.
ko: Body pixelates progressively — squares get larger as resolution drops. Dissolves into a cloud of falling pixel blocks that scatter and fade. A brief screen-tear artifact, then nothing.

name: Vesper
idle: Star points twinkle in sequence around the body (1-2-3-4 cycle). Faint constellation lines connecting the stars pulse softly. Body has a gentle luminous breathing glow.
attack: Stars flare bright simultaneously, then body lunges forward in a headbutt/tackle. A trail of star-light follows the motion. Settles back with stars returning to normal twinkle rhythm.
hurt: Stars dim momentarily — all go dark for a flash, then reignite. Body flinches back with constellation lines flickering. A brief moment of near-invisibility.
ko: Stars go dark one by one in sequence. Constellation lines break and fade. Body outline dims to near-invisible, leaving just a faint afterglow that fades to nothing.

name: Equinox
idle: Star points orbit the body in a slow elliptical path. Body emits a gentle, balanced glow — half warm, half cool light. Constellation lines redraw themselves in a continuous loop.
attack: Stars align into a focused beam pattern, then a pulse of celestial light shoots forward from the center. Body braces during emission. Stars scatter back to orbits afterward.
hurt: Orbital pattern disrupts — stars scatter chaotically. Constellation lines break into fragments. Body flickers between warm and cool light erratically. Slowly restabilizes.
ko: Stars scatter outward in all directions like a tiny supernova. Constellation lines shatter. Center point collapses to darkness. Stars fade in the distance.

name: Thunderclaw
idle: Claws flex and grip the ground rhythmically. Lightning arcs crackle between claw tips and the ground. Shoulders shift with a predatory breathing rhythm. Eyes glow with electric intensity.
attack: Lunges forward with claws extended, a bright electric arc connecting the claws in a sweeping strike. Body extends fully into the lunge with jaws open. Lightning trails from the claw tips. Lands heavy and pulls back to stance.
hurt: Staggers back on hind legs with an involuntary electric discharge — sparks fly in all directions. Shakes head with visible pain. Drops back to all fours with a growl.
ko: Collapses forward, claws scraping the ground. One final massive lightning crack from the body, then all electricity dies. Body goes still, eyes dim, smoke wisps rise.

name: Ironbark
idle: Bark plates creak and shift subtly — like a tree in wind but mechanical. Root tendrils at the base slowly grip and re-grip the ground. Deep, slow breathing visible in trunk expansion. Moss patches glow faintly.
attack: Lowers head and charges forward in a heavy ram — the entire massive body moves as one unit. Impact sends bark chips and dust forward. Ground cracks beneath the charge. Pulls back slowly with weight.
hurt: Bark cracks visibly with a loud-looking split. Splinters and chips fly from the impact point. Body rocks backward but holds ground — roots dig in. Amber sap seeps from the crack.
ko: Falls like a felled tree — slow, heavy timber. Bark plates separate and fall. Root tendrils release the ground and go limp. Settles with a heavy impact, moss dimming.

name: Vortail
idle: Tail spirals continuously — a visible vortex of water/energy at the tail tip. Water particles orbit the tail in a tight spiral. Body sways with fluid, predatory grace. Eyes track movement.
attack: Tail vortex intensifies and expands, then body whips forward with a claw strike that trails phase distortion. The vortex sends a shockwave of warped space forward. Settles back with tail still spinning.
hurt: Vortex destabilizes — spins erratically, particles scatter. Body twists away from the hit. Tail briefly stops spinning before restarting with a shudder.
ko: Vortex collapses with a visual implosion — particles rush inward then burst outward. Body crumples sideways, tail goes straight and limp. Water particles rain down and evaporate.

name: Solstice
idle: Slow celestial rotation — the entire body rotates a few degrees back and forth. Stars are brighter and more numerous than T1 neutrals. Constellation lines form complex geometric patterns. A gravitational shimmer around the body.
attack: Stars align into concentric rings, then emit a wide pulse of stellar energy in all directions. The pulse wave expands outward as a visible ring of light. Stars scatter and reform afterward.
hurt: Entire constellation dims significantly — like a cloud passing over stars. Body trembles, geometric patterns distort. Slowly brightens back but with a few stars missing temporarily.
ko: Brief nova flash — all stars flare maximum brightness, then rapidly collapse inward to a single point. The point hovers for a beat, then winks out. Absolute darkness where it stood.

name: Stormfang
idle: Lightning crackles continuously along the body in branching patterns — never the same path twice. Storm clouds gather subtly around shoulders and head. Deep, powerful breathing. The air visibly vibrates around the creature.
attack: Rears up to full height, then drives forward with a lance of concentrated lightning from the jaws. The bolt is thick and branching, illuminating the entire frame. Thunder-shockwave visible as a pressure ring. Returns to stance with residual storm energy arcing across body.
hurt: Storm patterns on the body disrupt — lightning scatters wildly, some arcing to the ground involuntarily. Body recoils with a snarl. Storm clouds momentarily dissipate before reforming.
ko: All lightning concentrates into one final massive discharge upward, then completely dies. Storm clouds dissolve. Body collapses heavily, scales going dark. A last flicker of static, then stillness.

name: Terradon
idle: Ground trembles subtly with each breath — visible vibration lines. Tectonic stone plates on the body grind and shift against each other. Deep, slow, immovable presence. Dust particles drift around the feet.
attack: Rises on hind legs (enormous silhouette change), then brings both forelimbs down in a devastating crush. Stone spires erupt from the ground at the impact point. Massive dust cloud and debris. Returns to all fours with the ground still shaking.
hurt: Cracks spread across multiple body plates simultaneously. Large rock chunks break off. Body shudders but barely moves position — the hit is absorbed by sheer mass. Magma glow visible through the cracks.
ko: Body shatters — stone plates fragment and fall in sequence from top to bottom. Inner magma glow flares then cools. Crumbles into a mound of boulders and earth. Dust cloud settles.

name: Riftmaw
idle: Body ripples like disturbed water — edges constantly shifting and reforming. Void energy leaks from the maw as dark particles. Reality around the creature visibly warps — background distorts near the body edges. Eyes pulse with null light.
attack: Maw opens impossibly wide revealing a void interior. A concentrated beam of null energy fires forward — the beam visually erases/inverts what it passes through. Reality tears around the beam path. Maw closes with a snap, void residue dripping.
hurt: Dimensional tear appears across the body — a visible crack in the creature's form showing void space within. Body distorts and reforms. The tear seals but leaves a scar-like anomaly.
ko: Body begins collapsing into itself — a miniature void implosion. Edges fold inward, the maw is the last thing visible. Collapses to a point of nothing, leaving a faint rift-scar that fades.

name: Voltarion
idle: Electric corona pulses around the entire body — the creature IS the storm. Lightning chains arc between extremities continuously. The air around it vibrates and distorts with visible energy. A low-frequency power pulse radiates outward. This is not a creature using lightning — it is lightning given form.
attack: Rises upward, corona expanding to fill the frame. All lightning consolidates into a single point above, then descends as an apocalyptic strike — a pillar of pure electric devastation crashes down at the target zone. The frame whites out momentarily. Returns to idle with residual lightning raining down.
hurt: Corona flickers and destabilizes — the form beneath is briefly visible as something fragile under all that storm energy. Lightning arcs wildly and involuntarily. Reforms with a surge of defiant energy.
ko: Massive discharge — all stored lightning releases simultaneously in every direction. The entity's form scatters into pure energy, branching lightning bolts that spread outward and fade. The storm passes. Silence.

name: Lithosurge
idle: Tectonic plates grind with visible force — slow, immense, inevitable. Deep magma glow visible between every segment of the body. The ground beneath bows downward from sheer weight. Gravitational distortion visible around the body. Each micro-movement sends tremors outward.
attack: Raises both arms slowly — the weight of the motion is palpable. Then brings them down with continental force. The ground shatters in a radiating pattern. Shockwave visible as a pressure wall expanding outward. Tectonic uplift at the impact zone. The frame shakes. Slowly returns to standing.
hurt: Multiple segments crack simultaneously with magma flaring bright through the gaps. The body's tectonic structure partially separates before grinding back together. A visible pulse of heat and pressure escapes. Even hurt, it barely moves.
ko: Collapses in stages — legs first, then torso, then head. Each section hits the ground with a world-shaking impact. Magma cools rapidly, going from bright orange to dark stone. A mountain of cooling rock remains. The tremors slowly fade.

name: Nullweaver
idle: Reality warps continuously around the form — the background bends and distorts. Multiple void-threads extend from the body, weaving patterns in space. Eyes or core pulses with anti-light — a darkness that is somehow visible. The creature doesn't exist in space so much as space exists around it.
attack: Void-threads extend outward and anchor to the edges of the frame, then PULL — space itself collapses toward the target. Reality folds, compresses, breaks. A sphere of absolute void forms at the target zone, consuming everything before collapsing. The threads release and space snaps back, distorted.
hurt: Dimensional tears rip through the body — visible cracks in its form showing something beyond void. The weave of threads tangles and breaks. Form destabilizes, flickering between presence and absence. Slowly re-coheres with visible effort.
ko: The weave unravels thread by thread. Each void-thread snaps and dissolves. The form loses coherence — becomes a cloud of void particles. Implodes to a singularity point, then that point folds in on itself and vanishes. Reality rushes in to fill the vacuum. The space where it stood looks somehow cleaner.
